name: Coffee Pod Under Brewer Storage Drawer and Rubber Wood Knob - Brightroom™
description:
Maximize your counter space with this Coffee Pod Under Brewer Storage Drawer from Brightroom™. Crafted from steel in a sleek black finish, this rectangular coffee pod holder is designed to slide conveniently beneath your coffee maker to keep countertops clear. The pull-out drawer features a convenient crescent cut-out handle and multiple compartments to keep your coffee pods neatly sorted and easily accessible for your daily brewing routine.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
